properties.description: Source SQL table dataset with parameterized server, database, schema and table
Destination SQL table dataset with parameterized server, database, schema and table

dependsOn.activity: Concat target schema and Table Name

activities.name: Concat target schema and Table Name
from onprem to azure sql CultureResource3_copy1_copy2
GetTableMetadata
activities.description: Calculates the spread of IDs and total count to determine scaling.

source.sqlReaderQuery: SELECT CAST(COUNT(*) AS INT) as TotalRows, CAST(MIN(CultureResourceId) AS INT) as MinID, CAST(MAX(CultureResourceId) AS INT) as MaxID FROM dbo.CultureResource

activities.name: CalculateChunkCount
activities.description: Determines how many chunks to create based on row count (1 chunk per 5M rows, cap at 40).

sqlReaderQuery.value: SELECT [CultureResourceId], [CultureId], [ResourceId], CAST([ContentValue] AS NVARCHAR(MAX)) as ContentValue, [CreatedDate], [LastModifyDate], [IsIgnoredChange] FROM dbo.CultureResource WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE CultureResourceId BETWEEN @{item().start} AND @{item().end} AND ?DfDynamicRangePartitionCondition

properties.description: Data migration pipeline triggered by SQL Migration Tool. Copies data from source to destination SQL databases with optional truncation.

activities.name: GetTableList
activities.description: Retrieves list of tables to migrate from source database

activities.name: CheckTruncateFlag
activities.description: Check if truncation is requested before copying data

ifTrueActivities.name: ForEachTableTruncate
ifTrueActivities.description: Truncate each destination table before copy

text.value: @concat('IF OBJECT_ID(''[', item().SchemaName, '].[', item().TableNameOnly, ']'', ''U'') IS NOT NULL BEGIN TRY TRUNCATE TABLE [', item().SchemaName, '].[', item().TableNameOnly, '] END TRY BEGIN CATCH DELETE FROM [', item().SchemaName, '].[', item().TableNameOnly, '] END CATCH')

activities.name: ForEachTableCopy
activities.description: Copy data for each table in parallel

activities.name: CopyTableData
activities.description: Copy data from source to destination table
